
	bodyAttrs := func(w http.ResponseWriter) {
		if !enableBgStream {
			writeBodyAttrOnVisibilityChange(w)
		}

		if sess.UserID != "" {
			_, _ = io.WriteString(w, `data-init="@get('/chat/_$/'`)
			if enableBgStream {
				_, _ = io.WriteString(w, `,{openWhenHidden:true})"`)
			} else {
				_, _ = io.WriteString(w, `)"`)
			}
		}
	}
